metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: You are an independent professional, with a high level of responsibility and identifying and solving problems is something that comes naturally to you. As an Assistant Store Manager, you will support the Store Manager to achieve sales and service targets; maintaining best practices and identifying areas of improvements for store operations and other factors that contribute to providing an excellent experience for our customers and team members alike.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: Do you know what it takes to be the best support to a Manager? In the role of Assistant Store Manager you will be assisting on all store operations related matters such as sales, staff performance, store maintenance, visual merchandise and everything else that concerns the store up to our standards.

location.name: New York City, New York, United States

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: As a Customer Experience Coordinator (In-store), you help set the tone and ensure delivery of our Radically Personal customer journey. Consider yourself the store’s lead ambassador of the brand and point of reference for the customer. You support all activities necessary for the efficient operation of the store experience and provide exemplary service to maximize sales, promote the Company’s image of quality and professionalism. A Customer Experience Coordinator performs duties, in partnership with their management team, with the specific focus of shaping the store experience.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: Suitsupply is always pushing the boundaries of customer service, aiming to deliver the highest standards of care to our customers globally. We are hiring a Customer Service Specialist for our international, social, sales-driven, and dynamic Customer Service team. If you have a keen interest in fashion and have a fresh perspective on customer service, we’d love to hear from you!

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: Reporting to the Regional Customer Operations Manager, you’ll lead by example: actively handling customer cases while leading a team of senior and junior agents. Your role balances daily operations, coaching, and performance management, with a strong emphasis on empowering your team, fostering trust, and nurturing a supportive environment that drives collective success.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: The Engineering Manager steers multiple teams within the same domain (i.e. an Engineering Manager for ecommerce, steering the ecommerce teams). He/She is an agile leader, the team is responsible for its own success. If the team is not delivering, then the Engineering Manager should step in and make sure they are delivering.

metadata.name: Job USPs 1
metadata.value: This is not a traditional Controller position.

metadata.name: Job USPs 2
metadata.value: You will play a key role in building and improving our FP&A data and systems landscape, turning complex transactional data into scalable reporting and actionable insights.

metadata.name: Job USPs 3
metadata.value: Your focus is on data models, system logic, and process automation, not manual reporting.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value:
This is not a traditional Controller position. You will play a key role in building and improving our FP&A data and systems landscape, turning complex transactional data into scalable reporting and actionable insights.
Your focus is on data models, system logic, and process automation, not manual reporting.

metadata.name: Job USPs 1
metadata.value: As the Head of Product Development, you will lead the full product creation process from concept through commercialization, ensuring every development aligns with Suitsupply’s brand vision, commercial targets, and quality standards.

metadata.name: Job USPs 2
metadata.value: You will drive product and fabric innovation in close partnership with Design, Merchandising, Sourcing, and Production teams.

metadata.name: Job USPs 3
metadata.value: This role involves setting strategic direction, managing development timelines, and overseeing the successful handover from development into production.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: As the Head of Product Development, you will lead the full product creation process from concept through commercialization, ensuring every development aligns with Suitsupply’s brand vision, commercial targets, and quality standards. You will drive product and fabric innovation in close partnership with Design, Merchandising, Sourcing, and Production teams. This role involves setting strategic direction, managing development timelines, and overseeing the successful handover from development into production. You will also mentor and grow the Product Development team, fostering collaboration, operational excellence, and innovation. Your work will directly shape the future of Suitsupply’s product offering and support the company’s continued growth.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: The Head of VM is responsible for developing and driving the global visual merchandising strategy, ensuring a consistent and impactful brand experience across all regions and store formats. the Head of VM manages a team of regional VM Managers, and collaborates closely with key cross-functional partners (Styling, Merchandising, Allocation, Retail Managers, and Retail Operations). This role requires an exceptional blend of creativity, commercial acumen, and operational expertise, with a strong understanding of menswear and global retail dynamics.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: As a Junior Application Manager at Suitsupply, you will play a hands-on role in supporting the functional management and continuous improvement of our core merchandising and product systems — including PLM, PIM, ERP, allocation, planning, and merchandising platforms. Working closely with teams across Product Development, Merchandising, Planning, and Supply Chain, you will ensure our systems run smoothly, evolve alongside business needs, and reliably support seasonal trading cycles.

metadata.name: Job USPs 1
metadata.value: As the Manager Finance Operations, you will lead and oversee all aspects of Suitsupply’s global accounting and financial operations, ensuring seamless execution of financial processes and fostering continuous improvement.

metadata.name: Job USPs 2
metadata.value: Based at our headquarters in Amsterdam, you will play a pivotal role in shaping the financial infrastructure that supports our growing global footprint.

metadata.name: Job USPs 3
metadata.value: Following our recent migration to Microsoft Dynamics 365 and Medius for Accounts Payable automation, you will be the driving force behind maximising the value of these tools.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: As the Manager Finance Operations, you will lead and oversee all aspects of Suitsupply’s global accounting and financial operations, ensuring seamless execution of financial processes and fostering continuous improvement. Based at our headquarters in Amsterdam, you will play a pivotal role in shaping the financial infrastructure that supports our growing global footprint. Following our recent migration to Microsoft Dynamics 365 and Medius for Accounts Payable automation, you will be the driving force behind maximising the value of these tools. Establishing best practices, eliminating manual workarounds, and building scalable, AI-enabled workflows that allow our finance team to focus on high-value work. This is not a role for a caretaker; it is for someone who sees every manual step as an opportunity to improve.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: As a Merchandise Planner at Suitsupply, you'll be ensuring the right products are available at the right time to meet customer demands. You'll dive into sales data, forecasting future trends, and crafting strategies to optimize inventory levels while balancing sales and profitability. Collaborating closely with various teams, you'll contribute in shaping our global business and influence our rapid growth. In this role you'll be partnering with Merchandising, Production, Allocation teams.

metadata.name: Job USPs 1
metadata.value: As an Online Merchandiser at Suitsupply, you’ll drive the online success of key product categories across EMEA, the Americas and APAC for Suitsupply.com.

metadata.name: Job USPs 2
metadata.value: You’ll manage seasonal/product launches, optimize category listing and product pages, monitor stock levels and performance to turn data into strategic insights and smart actions that boost sales.

metadata.name: Job USPs 3
metadata.value: An exciting role where you will be responsible for managing your categories from day-to-day execution to driving strong commercial impact.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value:
As an Online Merchandiser at Suitsupply, you’ll drive the online success of key product categories across EMEA, the Americas and APAC for Suitsupply.com. You’ll manage seasonal/product launches, optimize category listing and product pages, monitor stock levels and performance to turn data into strategic insights and smart actions that boost sales. An exciting role where you will be responsible for managing your categories from day-to-day execution to driving strong commercial impact.  
  
You’ll work closely with teams across Merchandising, Planning, Retention and Acquisition to align strategies and deliver results. We’re looking for someone analytical, detail-oriented and collaborative—ready to make an impact in a fast-moving e-commerce environment.

metadata.name: Job USPs 1
metadata.value: As the Product Manager for Search & Discovery, you will own the end-to-end shopping flow of the Suitsupply webstore; spanning navigation, homepage, search, product listing pages, and product detail pages — with funnel conversion and add-to-bag rate as your north star.

metadata.name: Job USPs 2
metadata.value: You will lead a small AI-native squad of engineers and AI agents within the Commerce Platform domain, driving outcomes through sharp prioritization and hands-on collaboration rather than coordination overhead.

metadata.name: Job USPs 3
metadata.value: By combining behavioral data, qualitative insight, and AI-driven analysis, you will shape how millions of customers across 25+ countries discover and engage with our products.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: As the Product Manager for Search & Discovery, you will own the end-to-end shopping flow of the Suitsupply webstore; spanning navigation, homepage, search, product listing pages, and product detail pages — with funnel conversion and add-to-bag rate as your north star. You will lead a small AI-native squad of engineers and AI agents within the Commerce Platform domain, driving outcomes through sharp prioritization and hands-on collaboration rather than coordination overhead. By combining behavioral data, qualitative insight, and AI-driven analysis, you will shape how millions of customers across 25+ countries discover and engage with our products. This is a high-impact individual contributor role where your strategic decisions directly influence the shopping experience, revenue performance, and the future of AI-native product development at Suitsupply.

metadata.name: Job USPs 1
metadata.value: As a QC Inspector, you are the eyes and hands of Suitsupply’s quality function on the factory floor.

metadata.name: Job USPs 2
metadata.value: Permanently embedded at a production facility, you will perform final random inspections on all active production styles to ensure every garment meets Suitsupply’s exacting standards before it leaves the factory.

metadata.name: Job USPs 3
metadata.value: This role is central to our Phase 1 model — one dedicated inspector per factory, building deep knowledge of that facility’s processes and quality performance over time.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: As a QC Inspector, you are the eyes and hands of Suitsupply’s quality function on the factory floor. Permanently embedded at a production facility, you will perform final random inspections on all active production styles to ensure every garment meets Suitsupply’s exacting standards before it leaves the factory. This role is central to our Phase 1 model — one dedicated inspector per factory, building deep knowledge of that facility’s processes and quality performance over time. Working closely with factory inspectors and technicians, you will build trusted partnerships that drive continuous quality improvement.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value:
We are looking for a new quality coordinator to join our team. 

Our approach to men's fashion is strongly setting us apart from the establishment and is creating new space with tailoring at its core. We are there for people who want to be seen. People who don't just want to fit in, but want to find their own way and their own perfect fit. Professionals with a pioneering spirit who are straight to the point, effective and have a strong sense of aesthetic & flair.

Professionals with a pioneering spirit who are straight to the point, effective and have a strong sense of aesthetic & flair.

metadata.value: As a Sales Supervisor, you are an independent professional, with a high level of responsibility and identifying and solving problems is something that comes naturally to you.  You have an opinion and share that with others through genuine and straight to the point communication. Sales Supervisors are excited to build relationships and have a personal approach to each interaction.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: As a Sales Support, you will support the Sales team by ensuring that the store is fully prepared and stocked throughout the working day. You will be responsible for receiving deliveries and organizing the stock and the store. With your help, the Sales team will be assisting our customers in the best way they can!

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: As a Sales Support, you play a critical role in a successful customer journey. You have a contagious energy and possess an entrepreneurial spirit. You have a strong sense of your own personal style and are enthusiastic about hospitality. You will be responsible for facilitating strong customer relationships and have a personal approach to each interaction.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: As a Sales Support, you will support the Sales team by ensuring that the store is fully prepared and stocked throughout the working day. metadata.name: Job USPs 1
metadata.value: As a Senior QC Manager, you are Suitsupply’s senior quality lead across a network of production sites, responsible for the consistency and integrity of every garment before it leaves the factory.

metadata.name: Job USPs 2
metadata.value: You will manage a team of factory-embedded QC Inspectors, drive rigorous inspection standards, and act as the primary bridge between the factory floor and Suitsupply’s central quality function.

metadata.name: Job USPs 3
metadata.value: egular factory visits are a core part of this role — this is a hands-on, field-present leadership position that combines people management, data analysis, and supplier development to directly influence the quality of Suitsupply’s global product.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: As a Senior QC Manager, you are Suitsupply’s senior quality lead across a network of production sites, responsible for the consistency and integrity of every garment before it leaves the factory. You will manage a team of factory-embedded QC Inspectors, drive rigorous inspection standards, and act as the primary bridge between the factory floor and Suitsupply’s central quality function. Regular factory visits are a core part of this role — this is a hands-on, field-present leadership position that combines people management, data analysis, and supplier development to directly influence the quality of Suitsupply’s global product.

metadata.name: Job USPs 1
metadata.value: As a Senior QC Manager, you are Suitsupply’s senior quality lead across a network of production sites, responsible for the consistency and integrity of every garment before it leaves the factory.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: As a Senior QC Manager, you are Suitsupply’s senior quality lead across a network of production sites, responsible for the consistency and integrity of every garment before it leaves the factory. You will manage a team of factory-embedded QC Inspectors, drive rigorous inspection standards, and act as the primary bridge between the factory floor and Suitsupply’s central quality function. Regular factory visits are a core part of this role — this is a hands-on, field-present leadership position that combines people management, data analysis, and supplier development to directly influence the quality of Suitsupply’s global product.

metadata.name: Job USPs 2
metadata.value: Raise the bar on our code base

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: If you’re a proactive, problem-solving team player who likes to take ownership of your work, this could be the job for you. As a senior member, you not only bring an abundance of expertise to your team, but you also know how to inspire, uplift and bring out the best in your colleagues. Always striving for continuous improvement, you adapt to change easily and are always eager to learn. In a flat organization like Suitsupply, there are ample opportunities to broaden your horizons by moving between different teams, and strengthen your skill set within the wider organization. Suitsupply is growing in every aspect IT-wise, and therefore, we're looking for Senior Software Engineers to join us on the journey of becoming the global tailoring expert.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: As a Stock Supervisor, you will work in partnership with the leadership team to ensure optimal preparedness for the customer experience. You will be responsible for receiving deliveries, organizing stock and identifying areas of opportunity for the store operations and allocation teams. As a Stock Supervisor, you have a close attention to detail, are tech savvy, with exceptional time management and organizational skills.

As Store Director you will be responsible for achieving sales and service targets; maintaining best practices and identifying areas of improvements for store operations and other factors that contribute to providing an excellent experience for our customers and team members alike.

Style Advisors are excited to build relationships and have a personal approach to each interaction.

metadata.name: Meta data summary (SEO & Application form)
metadata.value: At Suitsupply, we combine radical style with radical technology. We don’t just follow trends; we find our own perfect fit. We are looking for a Tech Lead who is a proactive, hands-on expert ready to own their domain. Whether you are a Backend or a Fullstack specialist with a deep .NET foundation, you will bridge the gap between technical strategy and business value to help us on our journey to becoming the global leader in tailored experiences.
